abilities.name: Bedside Manner
abilities.text: After resolving an action in which another ally within 6" of this model suffered damage, this model may drain a (soulstone) to place the damaged model into base contact with this model.

abilities.name: Don't Mind Me
abilities.text: The following do not restrict this model from declaring the Interact action: being engaged, leaving engagement with a Walk, and targeting a marker with an enemy in base contact.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

triggers.name: Duality
triggers.text: Enemy only. This model must choose: both players draw a card or both players discard a card.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Ancestral Healing
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. This model may discard a Reliquary upgrade.
actions.effects: Target heals 2. If this model discarded an upgrade, the target heals an additional +2.

triggers.name: Funeral Leavings
triggers.text: Once per activation. Attach a Reliquary upgrade to the target.

actions.name: Study
actions.effects: Target a Remains marker. Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target, then remove the target.

triggers.name: Ancestor's Marking
triggers.text: An ally within range gains a Greedy token.
